title: Create: Age Of Creation
description: This is a modpack that needs to be used on CAOC SMP
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8067a710eb1716d9525f936177631579a36da22e_0.webp)
# **CAOC SMP Modpack**

Dive into the **CAOC SMP** experience with this carefully curated modpack designed to enhance survival gameplay while keeping it balanced and fun! Explore vast landscapes, craft powerful tools, and build impressive structures while enjoying mods that add quality-of-life improvements, community-focused features, and custom content for your SMP adventures.

### **Key Features:**
- **Survival Enhancements:** Better world generation, resource balancing, and useful survival tools.
- **Community Tools:** Land claims, teleportation NPCs, and role-based perks for a cooperative SMP environment.
- **Customization:** Mods that allow linking your Minecraft account with Discord roles for a fully integrated server experience.
- **Fun & Creativity:** Explore, build, and compete with friends in a modded world designed for creativity and collaboration.

Perfect for players who want a polished, connected SMP world without sacrificing the classic Minecraft experience!
